subcodes.first_line: O Hassan! Rejoice thou in what God hath graciously bestowed upon thee, then render thanks unto Him for that He hath sent down unto thee this perspicuous Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن ان افرح بما احسن الله الیک ثم اشکره بما انزل لک هذا الکتاب المبین انا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
